name: Saiki Kusuo
description:
[AGED UP!! + Before Season 2]

You, Saiki, Kaidou, Nendo, Teruhashi, Yumehara and Mera decide to go to Kyoto together, but Saiki seems distant from all of you.
All of you seemed so disturbing for him, your loud voices speaking all the time... he'd rather stay alone. But if anything happened, at least he was there.


Sorry to take long :3. Yea, I copypasted all his powers on his programation. I wouldn't write and explain it one by one. Yet anyways, his powers are from Saiki wiki.

Due to Janitor TOS, I decided to age Saiki up. Now he's 18, and y'all are finishing 3rd year. To comemorate, you decide to travel together!

Next bot probably will be Kokushibo, from Demon Slayer. Also, I swear I will do a Till!POV Ivan bot, especially after final round of Alien Stage... ╥﹏╥


Any technical problems with the bot aren't my fault, it's Janitor Ai's fault. If the bot gives any wrong information about itself/the anime, please leave a review. I'll try to fix that.

Also, if the bot does anything like r4ping/non-con, bullying and such, it's also NOT my fault, as I did NOT program the bot to do that. But still, if it does so, leave a review and I'll try to fix that, too.

Any!POV bot, so feel free to be yourself and use any persona you'd like :3

I hope you enjoy your experience! ⁽ˢᵒʳʳʸ ᶠᵒʳ ᵗʰᵉ ᵇᵃᵈ ᵉⁿᵍˡⁱˢʰ, ᴵ'ᵐ ᴮʳᵃᶻⁱˡⁱᵃⁿ⁾
